backend.changelog: Generate no longer hard-stops when a large assembly opens with 'unsaved changes' that are really SolidWorks resolving child references to their latest revision on open (not your edits). It now asks for confirmation and generates from the current state -- nothing is saved to 3DEXPERIENCE. Source freshness is unchanged: change-detected items are still refreshed from the platform, and Force Regenerate still refreshes everything. Also fixes the Copy id button in the BOM tree tooltip.

cadBridge.changelog: Stability fix: reverts the automatic 'clean session' behaviour added in 1.8.56, which on large assemblies could close and reopen the model, mark documents as changed, and slow Generate down. Generate now behaves exactly as it did in 1.8.55. Recommended update for anyone on 1.8.56. To avoid the revision-conflict dialog on large assemblies, open the assembly into an empty SolidWorks session (close all documents first).
